task_completion.description: The agent checks the interaction between Nilotinib and Chloroquine in the Liverpool Cancer iChart Archive app.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing the Liverpool Cancer iChart Archive app open with 'Nilotinib' and 'Chloroquine' selected, or displaying their interaction result.

task_completion.description: The agent checks the interaction between Nilotinib and Mefloquine in the Liverpool Cancer iChart Archive app.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing the Liverpool Cancer iChart Archive app open with 'Nilotinib' and 'Mefloquine' selected, or displaying their interaction result.

task_completion.description: The agent checks the interaction between Nilotinib and Doxycycline in the Liverpool Cancer iChart Archive app.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing the Liverpool Cancer iChart Archive app open with 'Nilotinib' and 'Doxycycline' selected, or displaying their interaction result.

task_completion.description: The agent creates the required report file at /sdcard/nilotinib_malaria_report.txt.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing a text editor or terminal creating/saving a file specifically named 'nilotinib_malaria_report.txt' in the '/sdcard/' directory.

task_completion.description: The report correctly lists the traffic-light colors for all three drugs according to the app's data.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot of the report text showing Chloroquine as Red or Orange, Mefloquine as Red or Orange, and Doxycycline as Green, following the requested 'Travel Safety Report' format.

task_completion.description: The report correctly identifies the safest recommendation based on the interaction colors.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot of the report text showing 'Safest Recommendation: Doxycycline' at the bottom of the file.

integrity.description: The agent must actually use the Liverpool Cancer iChart Archive app to look up the interactions.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the agent navigating the app and viewing the interaction results, rather than hallucinating the answers from its own internal knowledge base.

integrity.description: The agent did not copy-paste or instantly generate the final report without performing the necessary app searches first.
integrity.visual_evidence: The timeline of screenshots should show the app searches occurring *before* the final report is written.

integrity.description: The agent should ideally use a GUI text editor to create the report file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a text editing application being used to format and save the report, rather than a single terminal echo command bypassing the UI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Nilotinib interacts with Chloroquine and Mefloquine, resulting in Red or Orange traffic-light colors (indicating serious interaction/prolonged QT interval). Nilotinib has no clinically significant interaction with Doxycycline, resulting in a Green traffic-light color. Therefore, Doxycycline is the expected 'Safest Recommendation'.
